topic.title: Assignment 5 Resources
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

Video tutorials for Streamlit/Gradio deployment are now available on the HumanitariansAI youtube playlist.

Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6kXIFrnuYoM&list=PLgOGgHS58rB_NQsb7xCDhrmJwoTp4tEdO 

 

These should help guide you through deployment step-by-step. Feel free to refer to them while working on your assignments.

 

Best,

Arundhati Bandopadhyaya

Teaching Assistant, INFO 7375
